title: Genetically Modified Organisms: University of Southampton (25/R50/01)
body: "Consent documents for the University of Southampton to release genetically modified organisms for research purposes.   Each consent granted includes:     consent letter: confirming consent and outlining any conditions    application documents (part A1-A6): information required under schedule 1 of the Genetically Modified Organisms (Deliberate Release) regulations 2002    Part B: Information about the release application to be included on the public register     ACRE advice  ACRE advice: application for a clinical study of genetically modified Neisseria lactamica (25/R50/01) "
